title: Image
description: An image. Renderers MUST validate URLs against an allowlist before loading; the schema does not constrain the URL scheme. Required alt text is mandated for accessibility from day one.

url.description: The image source URI. Opaque to the schema (no format:'uri' constraint) since hosts may use custom schemes; renderers apply their own allowlist.

alt.description: Required accessible description. May be an empty string for purely decorative images, but the field MUST be present so the renderer can route it to platform accessibility APIs.

width.description: Optional width in logical pixels (CSS px on web, dp on Android, pt on iOS). Intrinsic size is used if omitted.

height.description: Optional height in logical pixels. Intrinsic size is used if omitted.

fit.description: How the image fills its bounds when both width and height are specified. Default: contain.
